51:             Files.write(filePath, LexicalPreservingPrinter.print(compilationUnit).getBytes());
52:         }
53:     }
54: 
55:     private static void rewriteCompilationUnit(final CompilationUnit compilationUnit) {
56:         compilationUnit.findAll(BlockStmt.class).forEach(Main::rewriteBlock);
57:         compilationUnit.findAll(ExpressionStmt.class).forEach(Main::rewriteExpressionStatement);
58:     }
59: 
60:     private static void rewriteBlock(final BlockStmt blockStmt) {
61:         final List<Statement> statements = blockStmt.getStatements();
62:         for (int i = 0; i < statements.size(); i++) {
63:             final Statement statement = statements.get(i);
64:             if (!statement.isExpressionStmt()) {
65:                 continue;
66:             }
67:             final MethodCallExpr call = statement.asExpressionStmt().getExpression().toMethodCallExpr().orElse(null);
68:             if (call == null || !isFlywaySetter(call)) {
69:                 continue;
70:             }
71:             final Optional<VariableDeclarator> variable = call.findAncestor(VariableDeclarator.class);
72:             if (!variable.isPresent() || !isFlywayType(variable.get().getType())) {
73:                 continue;
74:             }
75:             variable.get().setInitializer(rewriteInitializer(variable.get().getInitializer().orElse(null), call));
76:             statement.remove();
77:         }
78:     }
79: 
80:     private static void rewriteExpressionStatement(final ExpressionStmt statement) {
81:         final MethodCallExpr call = statement.getExpression().toMethodCallExpr().orElse(null);
82:         if (call == null || !isFlywaySetter(call)) {
83:             return;
84:         }
85:         final Optional<VariableDeclarator> variable = call.findAncestor(VariableDeclarator.class);
86:         if (!variable.isPresent() || !isFlywayType(variable.get().getType())) {
87:             return;
88:         }
89:         variable.get().setInitializer(rewriteInitializer(variable.get().getInitializer().orElse(null), call));
90:         statement.remove();
91:     }
92: 
93:     private static Expression rewriteInitializer(final Expression initializer, final MethodCallExpr setterCall) {
94:         final MethodCallExpr chain = buildBuilderChain(initializer, setterCall);
95:         return chain == null ? initializer : chain;
96:     }
97: 
98:     private static MethodCallExpr buildBuilderChain(final Expression initializer, final MethodCallExpr setterCall) {
99:         final MethodCallExpr base = initializer != null && initializer.isMethodCallExpr()
100:                 ? initializer.asMethodCallExpr()
101:                 : null;
102:         final MethodCallExpr builder = base != null && isFlywayLoadCall(base) ? base : newFlywayConfigureCall();
103:         final MethodCallExpr updated = appendFlywaySetter(builder, setterCall);
104:         return new MethodCallExpr(updated, "load");
105:     }
106: 
107:     private static MethodCallExpr newFlywayConfigureCall() {
108:         return new MethodCallExpr(new SimpleName("Flyway"), "configure");
109:     }
110: 
111:     private static MethodCallExpr appendFlywaySetter(final MethodCallExpr builder, final MethodCallExpr setterCall) {
112:         final String method = setterCall.getNameAsString();
113:         final NodeList<Expression> args = setterCall.getArguments();
114:         if ("setDataSource".equals(method) && args.size() == 1) {
115:             return new MethodCallExpr(builder, "dataSource", args);
116:         }
117:         if ("setClassLoader".equals(method) && args.size() == 1) {
118:             return new MethodCallExpr(builder, "configure", args);
119:         }
120:         if ("setLocations".equals(method) && args.size() == 1) {
121:             return new MethodCallExpr(builder, "locations", args);
122:         }
123:         if ("setValidateOnMigrate".equals(method) && args.size() == 1) {
124:             return new MethodCallExpr(builder, "validateOnMigrate", args);
125:         }
126:         return builder;
127:     }
128: 
129:     private static boolean isFlywaySetter(final MethodCallExpr call) {
130:         final String name = call.getNameAsString();
131:         return "setDataSource".equals(name)
132:                 || "setClassLoader".equals(name)
133:                 || "setLocations".equals(name)
134:                 || "setValidateOnMigrate".equals(name);
135:     }
136: 
137:     private static boolean isFlywayLoadCall(final MethodCallExpr call) {
138:         return "load".equals(call.getNameAsString()) && call.getScope().isPresent();
139:     }
140: 
141:     private static boolean isFlywayType(final ClassOrInterfaceType type) {
142:         return type.getNameAsString().equals("Flyway");
143:     }
144: }
